titleStmt.title: SII 30.37: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 37. (A.R. No. 114 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 20: 13th c. A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the royal order of making gift of paddy for providing food offerings and worship (pūjāvritti) to Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi Āṇdār. It is also stated that the paddy donated was from the remittence of the taxes by the sabhaiyār of Amarabhuyaṅgara-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and the ūrār of Veḷḷaṉūr to the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrājakesari
svastiśrī . koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ tevakaṉmikaḷu
kku Āḷuṭaiyār tirumurukaṉpūṇṭiyāṇṭāṟku Amutupaṭi
muṉṉāṉku paṉṉiru nāḻi ArikkuRead- aricikkunāḷoṉṟukku Añciraṇṭu vāci Eṟṟi nel
mukkuṟuṇiyāka Āṇṭoṉṟukku nel nūṟṟorupattirukalane tūṇip patakkum ka
ṟiyamutukkum viñcaṉattukkum kūlippārattukkumāka nel patineḻukalane tūṇippata
kkum Āka nel nūṟṟumuppatiṉ kalamum pūjāviruttikku nel muppatiṉ kalamum Āka ne
l nūṟṟaṟupatiṉ kalamum vīracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu nallūrāṉa Amarapuyaṅkarac caruppetima
ṅkalattuc capaiyārum veḷḷāṉūrārum namakku Iṟukkakkaṭava Iṟaiyile Irupatāva
tu kār mutal nīkki nammolai kuṭuttom vīracoḻa tevaṉeṉ Itu cantirātit
tavaṟ celvatāka cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭik koḷvaārkaḷākavum Itu kaṇ nana
rāṉāṟ pāṟpaṭuttuk kuṭukka Ivai Iḻattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
